summary: PowerShell scripts follow strict mode, error handling, and proper CLI conventions. Workflow structure is sound with correct permissions and triggers. CRITICAL FLAW: Run-ActTests.ps1 never creates rules.json fixture; workflow defaults to reading it from repo root, so tests would fail immediately. Deliverable lacks examples of rules.json structure. The code quality is good (scripts/workflow are 4/5), but incompleteness and untestable infrastructure (missing rules.json setup in test harness, no example rules provided) make it unshippable.
